text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond is burning with motivation for
this year's summer camp, where she plans to get
strong enough to be jinx-proof.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black is pretty motivated herself. Both of
them are working hard to prepare for the day
they'll run together.
